description: Default capability for the main window. Grants the fs plugin's read/write commands, but NOT any path - the static scope in tauri.conf.json (plugins.fs.scope) is empty, and the only path ever added to it is the single folder the user explicitly chooses via the pick_vault_folder command (see src/main.rs), granted dynamically at runtime with app.fs_scope().allow_directory(). Least privilege: no path is accessible until the user picks one.
